entities.name: BRACON HEBETOR
entities.description: A parasitoid wasp of the family Braconidae that develops on the millet head caterpillar.

entities.name: HELIOCHEILUS ALBIPUNCTELLA
entities.description: The millet head caterpillar, a lepidopteran pest of the family Noctuidae.

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: The host crop associated with the millet head caterpillar.

entities.name: LIFE-FERTILITY TABLES
entities.description: A method used to describe the life history and reproductive potential of an organism.

entities.name: INNATE CAPACITY OF INCREASE
entities.description: A biological parameter (r) representing the maximum potential for population growth, estimated at 0.26 for B. hebetor.

entities.name: NET REPRODUCTIVE RATE
entities.description: A biological parameter (R0) representing the average number of offspring produced by a female, estimated at 86.5 for B. hebetor.

entities.name: MEAN GENERATION TIME
entities.description: The average time between the birth of parents and the birth of their offspring, recorded as 1 day for B. hebetor.

entities.name: SEX RATIO
entities.description: The proportion of males to females among the progeny, recorded as 1:1 for B. hebetor.
